education.thesis: Non-invasive neural signal decoding using EEG
Sparse coding models of visual cortical representations

projects.title: Decoding motor imagery from EEG using transformer models
projects.description: Built a real-time BCI pipeline achieving 85% accuracy on 4-class motor imagery classification.

projects.title: Predictive coding model of V1 neural responses
projects.description: Implemented a hierarchical generative model explaining ~72% of variance in V1 responses to natural images.

publications.title: Sparse autoencoder representations align with human perceptual similarity judgments
publications.venue: NeurIPS Workshop on Symmetry and Geometry in Neural Representations

intro_call_summary: Student is interested in how the brain encodes and transforms sensory information. Strong engineering background. Wants a lab that works at the intersection of theory and experiment. Open to both neuroscience departments and CS/AI labs with neuro focus. Prefers labs that have active collaboration with experimental groups.
